title: Comprehensive Jina AI Multi-Endpoint Reader Skill Suite
job:
Create a comprehensive Jina Reader skill covering ALL available Jina AI endpoints.

1. Create the skill directory:
   mkdir -p skills/jina-reader

2. Create skills/jina-reader/SKILL.md:
---
name: jina-reader
description: Comprehensive Jina AI API suite - read URLs to markdown/JSON, search the web, embed text/images to vectors, rerank documents. Requires JINA_API_KEY.
---

# Jina Reader

Complete wrapper for Jina AI Search Foundation APIs: Reader (URL extraction), Search (web search), Embeddings (text/image vectorization), and Reranker (document ranking).

## Setup

Requires `JINA_API_KEY` environment variable. Get free API key at https://jina.ai (includes 10M free tokens).

## Available Endpoints

### 1. Read URL to Markdown/JSON
```bash
skills/jina-reader/read.sh <url> [format] [options]
```
- `url` (required) — Web page URL
- `format` (optional, default: markdown) — markdown, html, json, text, screenshot, pageshot
- `options` (optional) — JSON string of query params (e.g., '{"wait_for_selector":".content","with_links":"true"}')

### 2. Search the Web
```bash
skills/jina-reader/search.sh <query> [num_results] [options]
```
- `query` (required) — Search term
- `num_results` (optional, default: 5) — Number of results (default 5, max 5)
- `options` (optional) — JSON string of params (e.g., '{"site":"github.com","no_content":"false"}')

### 3. Embed Text/Images to Vectors
```bash
skills/jina-reader/embed.sh <input> [model] [dimension]
```
- `input` (required) — Text to embed or image URL
- `model` (optional, default: jina-embeddings-v3) — jina-embeddings-v3 or jina-embeddings-v4
- `dimension` (optional) — Vector dimension (32-8192)

### 4. Batch Embed Documents
```bash
skills/jina-reader/batch-embed.sh <json_file> [model]
```
- `json_file` (required) — JSON file with array of texts/images
- `model` (optional, default: jina-embeddings-v3) — Model to use

### 5. Rerank Documents
```bash
skills/jina-reader/rerank.sh <query> <docs_json> [model] [top_n]
```
- `query` (required) — Ranking query
- `docs_json` (required) — JSON array of documents to rank
- `model` (optional, default: jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual) — Reranker model
- `top_n` (optional, default: all) — Return top N results

## Reader API Headers (Optional)

All read.sh calls support these headers:
- `X-With-Links-Summary=true` — Include links summary
- `X-With-Images-Summary=true` — Include images summary
- `X-With-Generated-Alt=true` — Add alt text to images
- `X-No-Cache=true` — Bypass cache
- `X-Token-Budget=5000` — Max tokens for request
- `X-Retain-Images=none` — Remove all images
- `X-Remove-Selector=.nav,.footer` — Exclude elements by CSS selector
- `X-Wait-For-Selector=.content` — Wait for element before returning

## Examples

```bash
# Read URL as markdown
skills/jina-reader/read.sh "https://example.com"

# Read URL as JSON with links and images
skills/jina-reader/read.sh "https://example.com" json '{"with_links":"true","with_images":"true"}'

# Search web
skills/jina-reader/search.sh "latest AI breakthroughs" 5

# Search within site
skills/jina-reader/search.sh "nodejs best practices" 3 '{"site":"nodejs.org"}'

# Embed text
skills/jina-reader/embed.sh "The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog"

# Embed with custom dimension
skills/jina-reader/embed.sh "sample text" jina-embeddings-v4 256

# Batch embed from file
skills/jina-reader/batch-embed.sh documents.json jina-embeddings-v3

# Rerank documents
skills/jina-reader/rerank.sh "machine learning" '["doc about AI", "doc about cooking"]' jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual 2
```

## Rate Limits

- Reader APIs (r.jina.ai, s.jina.ai): 200 RPM (2k RPM premium)
- Embeddings/Reranker: 500 RPM (2k RPM premium)
- Token usage: 100K TPM free, 2M TPM paid, 50M TPM premium

---

3. Create skills/jina-reader/read.sh:
#!/bin/bash

URL="$1"
FORMAT="${2:-markdown}"
OPTIONS="${3:-}"

if [ -z "$URL" ]; then
  echo "Usage: read.sh <url> [format] [options]"
  echo "Formats: markdown (default), html, json, text, screenshot, pageshot"
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$JINA_API_KEY" ]; then
  echo "Error: JINA_API_KEY not set"
  exit 1
fi

# Build headers
HEADERS="-H 'Authorization: Bearer $JINA_API_KEY'"

case "$FORMAT" in
  json)
    HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'Accept: application/json'"
    ;;
  html)
    HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-Return-Format: html'"
    ;;
  text)
    HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-Return-Format: text'"
    ;;
  screenshot)
    HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-Return-Format: screenshot'"
    ;;
  pageshot)
    HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-Return-Format: pageshot'"
    ;;
  *)
    HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-Return-Format: markdown'"
    ;;
esac

# Add optional headers from options JSON
if [ -n "$OPTIONS" ]; then
  if command -v jq &> /dev/null; then
    # Extract header options
    WAIT_FOR=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.wait_for_selector // empty')
    WITH_LINKS=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.with_links // empty')
    WITH_IMAGES=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.with_images // empty')
    WITH_ALT=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.with_generated_alt // empty')
    NO_CACHE=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.no_cache // empty')
    TOKEN_BUDGET=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.token_budget // empty')
    RETAIN_IMAGES=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.retain_images // empty')
    REMOVE_SELECTOR=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.remove_selector // empty')
    
    [ -n "$WAIT_FOR" ] && HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-Wait-For-Selector: $WAIT_FOR'"
    [ "$WITH_LINKS" = "true" ] && HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-With-Links-Summary: true'"
    [ "$WITH_IMAGES" = "true" ] && HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-With-Images-Summary: true'"
    [ "$WITH_ALT" = "true" ] && HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-With-Generated-Alt: true'"
    [ "$NO_CACHE" = "true" ] && HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-No-Cache: true'"
    [ -n "$TOKEN_BUDGET" ] && HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-Token-Budget: $TOKEN_BUDGET'"
    [ -n "$RETAIN_IMAGES" ] && HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-Retain-Images: $RETAIN_IMAGES'"
    [ -n "$REMOVE_SELECTOR" ] && HEADERS="$HEADERS -H 'X-Remove-Selector: $REMOVE_SELECTOR'"
  fi
fi

# Make request
eval "curl -s -X POST 'https://r.jina.ai/' $HEADERS -d 'url=$URL'"

4. Create skills/jina-reader/search.sh:
#!/bin/bash

QUERY="$1"
NUM_RESULTS="${2:-5}"
OPTIONS="${3:-}"

if [ -z "$QUERY" ]; then
  echo "Usage: search.sh <query> [num_results] [options]"
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$JINA_API_KEY" ]; then
  echo "Error: JINA_API_KEY not set"
  exit 1
fi

# URL encode query
QUERY_ENCODED=$(echo "$QUERY" | jq -sRr @uri)

# Build URL
SEARCH_URL="https://s.jina.ai/$QUERY_ENCODED"

# Add options if provided
if [ -n "$OPTIONS" ]; then
  if command -v jq &> /dev/null; then
    SITE=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.site // empty')
    NO_CONTENT=$(echo "$OPTIONS" | jq -r '.no_content // empty')
    
    [ -n "$SITE" ] && SEARCH_URL="$SEARCH_URL?site=$SITE"
    [ "$NO_CONTENT" = "true" ] && SEARCH_URL="$SEARCH_URL&X-Respond-With=no-content"
  fi
fi

curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $JINA_API_KEY" -H "Accept: application/json" "$SEARCH_URL"

5. Create skills/jina-reader/embed.sh:
#!/bin/bash

INPUT="$1"
MODEL="${2:-jina-embeddings-v3}"
DIMENSION="${3:-}"

if [ -z "$INPUT" ]; then
  echo "Usage: embed.sh <text_or_image_url> [model] [dimension]"
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$JINA_API_KEY" ]; then
  echo "Error: JINA_API_KEY not set"
  exit 1
fi

# Build request body
REQUEST_BODY="{\"model\":\"$MODEL\",\"input\":\"$INPUT\""

if [ -n "$DIMENSION" ]; then
  REQUEST_BODY="$REQUEST_BODY,\"dimensions\":$DIMENSION"
fi

REQUEST_BODY="$REQUEST_BODY}"

curl -s -X POST "https://api.jina.ai/v1/embeddings" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $JINA_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "$REQUEST_BODY"

6. Create skills/jina-reader/batch-embed.sh:
#!/bin/bash

JSON_FILE="$1"
MODEL="${2:-jina-embeddings-v3}"

if [ -z "$JSON_FILE" ] || [ ! -f "$JSON_FILE" ]; then
  echo "Usage: batch-embed.sh <json_file> [model]"
  echo "JSON file should contain array of texts/image URLs"
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$JINA_API_KEY" ]; then
  echo "Error: JINA_API_KEY not set"
  exit 1
fi

# Build request body
REQUEST_BODY="{\"model\":\"$MODEL\",\"input\":$(cat "$JSON_FILE")}"

curl -s -X POST "https://api.jina.ai/v1/embeddings" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $JINA_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "$REQUEST_BODY"

7. Create skills/jina-reader/rerank.sh:
#!/bin/bash

QUERY="$1"
DOCS_JSON="$2"
MODEL="${3:-jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual}"
TOP_N="${4:-}"

if [ -z "$QUERY" ] || [ -z "$DOCS_JSON" ]; then
  echo "Usage: rerank.sh <query> <docs_json> [model] [top_n]"
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$JINA_API_KEY" ]; then
  echo "Error: JINA_API_KEY not set"
  exit 1
fi

# Build request body
REQUEST_BODY="{\"model\":\"$MODEL\",\"query\":\"$QUERY\",\"documents\":$DOCS_JSON"

if [ -n "$TOP_N" ]; then
  REQUEST_BODY="$REQUEST_BODY,\"top_n\":$TOP_N"
fi

REQUEST_BODY="$REQUEST_BODY}"

curl -s -X POST "https://api.jina.ai/v1/rerank" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $JINA_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "$REQUEST_BODY"

8. Make all scripts executable:
chmod +x skills/jina-reader/*.sh

9. Create symlink to activate:
ln -s ../jina-reader skills/active/jina-reader

10. Test all endpoints:
echo "=== Testing Read API ==="
skills/jina-reader/read.sh "https://jina.ai/reader" markdown '{"with_links":"true"}' | head -20

echo -e "\n=== Testing Search API ==="
skills/jina-reader/search.sh "jina ai reader api" 3 | jq '.data[0]'

echo -e "\n=== Testing Embed API ==="
skills/jina-reader/embed.sh "hello world" jina-embeddings-v3 | jq '.data[0].embedding[:5]'

echo -e "\n=== Testing Rerank API ==="
skills/jina-reader/rerank.sh "machine learning" '["document about AI","document about cooking","neural networks"]' jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual 2 | jq '.results'

echo -e "\n=== Testing Batch Embed ==="
echo '["text one","text two","text three"]' > /tmp/test_docs.json
skills/jina-reader/batch-embed.sh /tmp/test_docs.json jina-embeddings-v3 | jq '.usage'
rm /tmp/test_docs.json

11. Verify symlink:
ls -la skills/active/ | grep jina

12. If all tests pass, commit with message: "Add comprehensive Jina Reader skill with all API endpoints"
